text.title: Agile BA Frameworks Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Audit reads 'we run stand-ups therefore we Stimulate Collaboration'. Principle 4 marked 5/5 with no behavior evidence.
antipattern.root-cause: Ceremonies treated as principle adherence proof.
antipattern.fix: Require behavior-change evidence per principle, not attendance records.

antipattern.symptom: Team of 30 people on a single product → SAFe proposed. Overhead bigger than benefit.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent pattern-matches 'agile + scaling' → SAFe regardless of fit.
antipattern.fix: Add guard: 'if team <50 people, do not propose SAFe; consider LeSS or Scrum@Scale instead.'

antipattern.symptom: Agent picks 'all 6 DA lifecycles apply'. Output useless for team.
antipattern.fix: Force single primary + at most one alternative; reject multi-pick at validation.

antipattern.symptom: Agent inlines verbatim BABOK passages. License risk.
antipattern.fix: Restrict to summary + URL; never inline long quotes; quote-length detector in validator.
